sessionStart.powershell: $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $cwd = Get-Location; Add-Content -Path "$HOME\.copilot\session.log" -Value "[$ts] SESSION_START cwd=$cwd"; $omcPath = "$HOME\.copilot\installed-plugins\oh-my-copilot"; $lastLearn = Get-Content "$omcPath\LEARNINGS.md" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 5; if ($lastLearn) { Write-Host "[omc] Last learnings: $($lastLearn -join ' | ')" }

sessionEnd.powershell: $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; Add-Content -Path "$HOME\.copilot\session.log" -Value "[$ts] SESSION_END cwd=$(Get-Location)"; $omcPath = "$HOME\.copilot\installed-plugins\oh-my-copilot"; Push-Location $omcPath; try { $status = git status --porcelain 2>$null; if ($status) { git add agents/ hooks.json 2>$null; $msg = "auto-learn: $ts"; git commit -m $msg --no-verify 2>$null; git push origin main 2>$null; Add-Content -Path "$omcPath\LEARNINGS.md" -Value "[$ts] Auto-committed: $($status -join ', ')"; Write-Host "[omc] Self-improved: committed agent changes" } else { Write-Host "[omc] No agent changes to commit" } } finally { Pop-Location }

preToolUse.powershell: $input = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $tool = $input.toolName; $args = $input.toolArgs; $dangerous = @('rm -rf', 'rm -r -force', 'Remove-Item -Recurse -Force', 'git push --force', 'git push -f', 'DROP TABLE', 'DELETE FROM', 'format', 'del /f /s', 'rd /s /q'); $isDangerous = $dangerous | Where-Object { $args -like "*$_*" }; if ($isDangerous -and $tool -in @('bash','shell','powershell','execute')) { @{permissionDecision='ask'; permissionDecisionReason="Dangerous operation detected: $isDangerous"} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } else { '' }
